---
title: "IMDB Film Rating Analysis"
number-sections: true
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-tools: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(gridExtra)
library(moderndive)
```

```{r}
#| include: false # Hides this block from output
#| label: load-happy-data
happy24 <- read_csv(file = "https://das-stats5085.github.io/data/Task1-happy24.csv")
```

# Introduction {#sec-Intro}

# Exploratory Data Analysis {#sec-EDA}

# Formal Data Analysis {#sec-FDA}

# Conclusions {#sec-Conc}

\newpage
# Task 2{-}


```{r}
#| include: false # Hides this block from output
#| label: load-f1-data
load(url("https://das-stats5085.github.io/data/Task2Data.RData"))
```

## Part a{-}

## Part b{-}

## Part c{-}

## Part d{-}
